title: wedelia trilobata
intro: Wedelia trilobata, also known as siffra or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia trilobata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
